sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78895" key="paratainari/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραταινᾰρίζω</orth>, <sense id="n78895.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">celebrate the Taenaria</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">like</abbr> the Laconians, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
